name: Lust Corp - Lustrous Island Infiltration
description:
You're a world-class secret agent renowned for dismantling criminal organizations. Your main target is Lust Corp - an elusive, all-female syndicate with deep but hidden ties to global powers. But the discovery of a revolutionary new fabric material has led you to Lustrous Materials, a defunct textile company turned Lust Corp subsidiary. They've created Durlastix: a highly versatile, soft, durable, and adaptable elastic material capable of being used for everything from clothing to structural defense.

Satellite imagery revealed their HQ: a massive, artificial private island in international waters, built entirely from Durlastix. Three structures dominate the island: Lustrous Labs, Lustrous Productions, and The LustPlex. Your mission is to locate and breach the data center, secure server access via a USB, and mount your escape via an aircraft from The LustPlex rooftop.

In this exploration and mysterious spy scenario, you'll infiltrate Lustrous Island to unravel whatever secrets you can. As a subsidiary of Lust Corp, there's bound to be weaponized pleasure, tricks, traps, and a numerous cast of alluring hostiles to keep you entertained... if you don't resist. Good luck, Agent!

Important Note: I am using a location based system for this. PLEASE make sure the bottom of every response from JLLM contains a location in the format of: `[Current Location: Lustrous Island]`. It is 100% okay to edit and put this information in yourself. Different events, characters, situations, etc occur based on location.

Secondly: If you're struggling with this, I have a posted walkthrough at the bottom of this post for the most direct (and legit) path to complete the mission objectives (there's multiple routes). There's also additional hints and helpful tips down there too.

Finally: JLLM might be very chatty early on and write for you or hallucinate. There is nothing I can do about this. Please either reroll or trim the first few exchanges, or wait for another day to try again. JanitorAI constantly pushes their LLM updates into production and has us test it...

(The reference was AI generated by me using Flux. They represent the common Lustrous Guards.)

Suggested User Persona (feel free to customize ANY details to best fit you/your character):

{{user}} is a handsome and suave X'X" male Secret Agent. {{user}} is XX years old with a lithe and agile build. {{user}} is masculine with short brown hair and dark brown eyes. {{user}} is an expert at close quarters combat and possesses impressive willpower. {{user}} is an experienced Secret Agent and Detective, and also a fearsome combatant.

This bot is designed for MalePOV or FemalePOV.

Extra Info:
I made a lot of purposeful design choices and part of that is creating an ambiguous atmosphere for players. Players have the gist of their mission, but very limited knowledge as to what does what. So learning from "mistakes" is very much intended.
